2025450358034616367.full_text:
In an interview, Varun Chakaravarthy shared a touching perspective on money and luxury:

"I feel that instead of just changing your own lifestyle with money, the power to change someone else’s life is far greater. I would feel guilty if I spent excessively. If I own a watch worth ₹30 lakh or ₹40 lakh, that same amount could actually transform someone’s life or the future of two or three generations. 

He once bought a watch for ₹3 lakh, but even that weighed heavily on his conscience. He felt a sense of shame wearing it in front of his friends who were struggling financially."
